title: Compressed NFT Scanner
body: Fetch all cNFTs (Metaplex Bubblegum / Digital Asset Standard) from any Solana wallet using GoldRush's DAS-compatible NFT endpoint — returns asset ID, Merkle tree address, creator, collection address, and full metadata URI for every compressed NFT. Critical for gaming apps (Aurory, Star Atlas items), DePIN reward programs, and loyalty platforms that mint thousands of cNFTs at ~1/1000th the cost of standard NFTs. One call returns the complete cNFT inventory without running a custom DAS indexer.

title: Metaplex NFT Portfolio
body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/nfts/` to return every Metaplex NFT held by a wallet — standard NFTs, pNFTs (programmable NFTs with transfer hooks), and print editions — each with name, image URI, collection address, traits array, and estimated USD floor value derived from recent collection sales. Handles both legacy Token Metadata standard and Token Extensions (Token-2022). Build a complete Solana NFT gallery or valuation dashboard with a single API call.

title: Multi-Chain NFT Gallery
body: Discover and display every NFT a wallet holds across all chains in one gallery — scan with getAddressActivity then fetch NFTs per active chain.

title: NFT Collection Analytics
body: Holder count, top holders, transfer velocity, and ownership concentration for any ERC-721 collection — build analytics dashboards without a marketplace API.

title: NFT Gallery Viewer
body: Drop-in React component that renders a full NFT gallery for any wallet using GoldRush Kit's NFTWalletCollectionView â€” zero custom UI needed.

title: NFT Metadata Fetcher
body: Retrieve full NFT metadata, traits, and ownership history for any token onchain.

title: NFT Portfolio Valuation
body: Value an entire NFT portfolio using live collection and market data.

title: NFT Token Sale History
body: Full transfer and sale history for a single NFT token ID â€” who owned it, when it sold, and for how much. Powers provenance viewers and NFT detail pages.

title: NFT Traits Explorer
body: Fetch all trait types and their value distributions for an NFT collection. Essential for rarity calculators, collection analytics, and trait-based filtering UIs.

title: NFT Transfer Monitor
body: Real-time feed of NFT mints, sales, and transfers for any collection — subscribe to ERC-721 Transfer events via the wallet activity stream.

title: NFT-Gated App Boilerplate
body: Complete Next.js boilerplate with wallet connect, SIWE authentication, and NFT ownership gating — deploy a token-gated product in under an hour.

title: Solana NFT Collection Stats
body: Fetch aggregated on-chain stats for any Solana NFT collection by collection address — floor price in SOL and USD, 24h trading volume, total unique holder count, total listed supply, and top 5 holder wallets ranked by number of items. Pair with GoldRush's real-time NFT transfer stream to track when floor listings are scooped. Build a collection monitor that fires an alert when floor drops below your target price, volume spikes above 2x average, or holder concentration increases.
